title: Snowbird Snowflake Configuration
description: Schema for snowflake.yml configuration files used by Snowbird to manage Snowflake infrastructure.

databases.description: List of Snowflake databases to manage.

transient.description: Whether the database is transient. Transient databases have a max data retention of 1 day.

data_retention_time_in_days.description: Time Travel data retention period in days. Default is 7 for non-transient databases, 1 for transient.

schemas.description: List of schemas within this database.

transient.description: Whether the schema is transient. Inherits from parent database if not specified.

data_retention_time_in_days.description: Time Travel data retention period in days. Inherits from parent database if not specified.

warehouses.description: List of Snowflake warehouses to manage.

size.description: Size of the warehouse. Default is 'x-small'.

roles.description: List of Snowflake roles to manage.

users.description: List of Snowflake users to manage.

network_policy.description: Name of the network policy to assign to this user. Must reference a network policy defined in this configuration or an existing one in Snowflake.

network_policies.description: List of Snowflake network policies to manage.

network_rules.description: Network rules for this policy. At least one of 'allowed' or 'blocked' must be specified.

allowed.description: List of allowed network rules. References fully qualified network rule names (e.g., 'database.schema.rule_name').

blocked.description: List of blocked network rules. References fully qualified network rule names (e.g., 'database.schema.rule_name').

grants.description: List of grant configurations that define permissions for roles.

role.description: The role to grant permissions to.

warehouses.description: Warehouses to grant USAGE on to this role.

read_on_schemas.description: Schemas to grant SELECT (read) access on. Grants select on all current and future tables, views, dynamic tables, and semantic views in the schema. Format: 'database.schema'.

write_on_schemas.description: Schemas to grant CREATE access on. Grants ability to create tables, views, dynamic tables, semantic views, tasks, alerts, masking policies, row access policies, and procedures. Format: 'database.schema'.

usage_on_schemas.description: Schemas to grant USAGE access on (without read or write). Format: 'database.schema'.

read_on_objects.description: Specific objects to grant SELECT access on. Format: 'type:database.schema.object_name'. Supported types: table, view, dynamic_table, semantic_view.

read_on_tables.description: Specific tables to grant SELECT access on. Format: 'database.schema.table_name'.

to_roles.description: Roles that this role should be granted to. Note: 'sysadmin' is automatically added if not present.

to_users.description: Users that this role should be granted to. Can be user names or UUIDs (for Entra ID users).
